title: M.A Jobs 2026 – Principal
shortInfo: West Bengal Public Service Commission (WBPSC) Principal Recruitment 2026 has been announced for 12 vacancies for eligible Master's Degree with the application window online open from 30-04-2026 to 03-07-2026 on WBPSC Official Website.

basic_details.job_title: WBPSC Principal Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 12 Posts
basic_details.short_information: West Bengal Public Service Commission (WBPSC) Principal Recruitment 2026 has been announced for 12 vacancies for eligible Master's Degree with the application window online open from 30-04-2026 to 03-07-2026 on WBPSC Official Website.

application_fee.details: Maximum Age Limit: 42 years as on 01-01-2026. Age Relaxation: Relaxable upto 5 years for SC/ST (West Bengal) and 3 years for OBC (West Bengal). PwBD up to 45 years.

age_limit.details: Candidates should download and read the WBPSC Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below.

qualification.education_qualification: Master’s Degree, M.Ed. / M.Ed or M.A.
qualification.details: Principal : Masters' Degree (2-year regular course) with Honours at Graduation level, at least 55% marks in any school teaching subject from recognised University. M.Ed./M.Ed. (Elementary) with 55% marks OR M.A. in Education with 55% marks + Diploma/Degree in Primary/Elementary Education with 55% marks from recognised University/Institute. Five years experience of teaching in Primary or Elementary Teachers' Training Institute. Knowledge of Bengali language (spoken and written). Computer Literacy.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 03-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of WBPSC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the WBPSC Principal recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of online applications is 03 July 2026. It is advisable to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: What is the educational qualification required for the Principal post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Master’s Degree with Honours at Graduation level (55% marks), M.Ed. or M.A. in Education with a Diploma/Degree in Primary/Elementary Education (55% marks), and five years of teaching experience in a relevant institute.

faq.question: What is the maximum age limit for the Principal position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Principal post is 42 years as of 01 January 2026. Age relaxations are applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available for the Principal post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 12 vacancies for the post of Principal in the District Institute of Education and Training.

faq.question: What is the application fee for the WBPSC Principal recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee for General/OBC candidates is Rs. 210/- plus service charges. SC/ST candidates from West Bengal and PwBD candidates (40% and above) are exempted from the fee.

faq.question: What is the salary structure for the Principal post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary in the pay scale of Rs. 67,300 to Rs. 1,73,200 per month.

faq.question: What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Screening Test (MCQ type) for shortlisting, followed by a merit-based Interview.

faq.question: Can candidates from outside West Bengal apply for the SC/ST fee exemption?
faq.answer: No, the fee exemption for SC/ST categories is applicable only for candidates belonging to West Bengal.

faq.question: Is there any age relaxation for candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided: up to 5 years for SC/ST (West Bengal) and 3 years for OBC (West Bengal). PwBD candidates can avail relaxation up to 45 years.

faq.question: Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification and the online application link are available on the WBPSC official website, which can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article.
